zh.lifeSummary: 當Humbert IV de BEAUJEU於大約1141年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧時，他的父親Humbert III de BEAUJEU23歲，母親Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON17歲。他於1161年與Agnès de THIERN在法國o-阿爾培斯o波奧結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1202年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o維爾福朗-素-薩o享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humbert IV de BEAUJEU于大约1141年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o波奧时，他的父亲Humbert III de BEAUJEU23岁，母亲Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON17岁。他于1161年与Agnès de THIERN在法国o-阿爾培斯o波奧结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1202年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯o維爾福朗-素-薩o享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Humbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. However, it was not common in Britain in the Middle Ages, and has always had a Continental flavour. It was used by Vladimir Nabokov for the name of the demented pederast, Humbert Humbert , who is the narrator in his novel Lolita ( 1955 ).

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Humbert IV de BEAUJEU was born about 1141, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Humbert III de BEAUJEU, was 23 and his mother, Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON, was 17. He married Agnès de THIERN in 1161, in Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1202, in Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humbert IV de BEAUJEU est né environ 1141, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Humbert III de BEAUJEU, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de THIERN en 1161, à Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1202, à Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humbert IV de BEAUJEU um 1141 in Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humbert III de BEAUJEU 23 und seine Mutter Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON 17. Er hat 1161 in Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Agnès de THIERN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1202 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humbert IV de BEAUJEU è nato il circa 1141 nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Humbert III de BEAUJEU, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de THIERN nel 1161, nel Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1202, nel Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Humbert IV de BEAUJEUが約1141年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウで生まれた時，父Humbert III de BEAUJEUは23歳，母Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBONは17歳であった。1161年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンビーウジェウでAgnès de THIERNと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1202年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンヴィレフランチェ-スル-サoンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Humbert IV de BEAUJEU(이)가 대략 1141년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 보제이우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humbert III de BEAUJEU(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1161년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 보제이우에서 Agnès de THIERN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1202년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 비레프랭체-수-사o니에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1141–ABT 1202: tany ho any amin'ny 1141–tany ho any amin'ny 1202

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humbert IV de BEAUJEU nasceu aproximadamente 1141, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Humbert III de BEAUJEU, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de THIERN em 1161, em Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1202, em Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humbert IV de BEAUJEU родился около 1141 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Humbert III de BEAUJEU было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de THIERN в 1161 г. в местности боджеу, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1202 г. в местности виллефрэнче-сур-саoн, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.ABT 1141–ABT 1202: e tusa o le 1141–e tusa o le 1202

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humbert IV de BEAUJEU nació aproximadamente 1141, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Humbert III de BEAUJEU, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alix Élise DE SAVOIE-D'ALBON, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Agnès de THIERN en 1161, en Beaujeu, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1202, en Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 63 años.
